name: scale-in-spring
css_keyframes: scale(0.85)+opacity 0 to scale(1)+opacity 1 with overshoot at 95ms to scale(1.03)

name: shimmer-skeleton
reduced_motion_alt: static gray fill; no animation (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference check)

name: bounce-in
css_keyframes: translateY(0) → translateY(-8px) → translateY(0) with 3 oscillations decreasing amplitude

name: progress-fill
css_keyframes: width 0% to N% or transform scaleX(0) to scaleX(target)
reduced_motion_alt: instant jump to value; no fill animation

name: count-up-number
css_keyframes: custom JS interpolation from 0 to target value; not CSS; use requestAnimationFrame
reduced_motion_alt: show final number instantly; no count-up

name: ripple-touch
css_keyframes: scale(0) to scale(2.5) + opacity 0.3 to 0 from touch point
reduced_motion_alt: background-color darken on active; no ripple
